industry: Vacation home rental / private pool venue

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive site (amenities, gallery, testimonials, FAQ, Facebook Messenger contact), mobile-friendly, Netlify hosting setup
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: No public email or phone on Facebook — Messenger-only inquiries, so SMS was never applicable here. 2026-07-17: grouped with the other 3 clients as SMS dual-SIM blocked / pending user action — user cannot send SMS right now for any of these; hold until user can send manually (Messenger) or picks another channel.

sources.address: Block 10 Lot 1, Phase 2, Congress Village, Manggahan, Rodriguez, Rizal, Philippines 1860
sources.notes: Category: Vacation Home Rental. 88% recommend (12 reviews). Always open. Private pool house with rain shower deck, indoor karaoke/entertainment lounge, alfresco dining pavilion, upstairs rooms with balcony view, on-site caretaker. Frequently booked for family reunions, birthdays, and barkada celebrations. No public rate sheet or phone/email listed — inquiries via Facebook Messenger only.
